name: Pineapple-Pear Mold
recipeIngredient: 2 medium pears, peeled, cored and chopped
20 ounces pineapple, crushed (packed in its own juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, soften the gelatin with 1/2 cup of orange juice.
2. Stir over low heat until the gelatin is dissolved.
3. Add the undrained crushed pineapple and the remaining orange juice to the pan.
4. Chill until partially set.
5. Gently fold in the pears and green pepper, if desired.
6. Turn the mixture into a 6-cup mold.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Unmold onto a plate.
